Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re

with open\('/tmp/aesop1_clean.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    text = f.read\(\)

def fw_to_hw\(s\):
    result = ''
    for c in s:
        code = ord\(c\)
        if 0xFF10 <= code <= 0xFF19:
            result += chr\(code - 0xFF10 + ord\('0'\)\)
        else:
            result += c
    return result

excluded = {3,4,6,8,10,11,13,15,16,18,20,21,25,27,31,32,33,34,38,39,44,46,49,51,52,54,55,57,58,60,61,62,70,73,74,77,80,81,84,85,86,95,109,110,117,118,122,127,128,130,134,135,139,151,152,162,163,174,179,186,187,190,191,193,202,205,208,216,232,239,240,244,249,250,251,254,257,258,260,280,283,288,291,293,297,300,302,311}

# Split by story headers
pattern = r'\\n\(?=[０-９\\d]+[．.]\)'
parts = re.split\(pattern, text\)

results = []
for part in parts:
    part = part.strip\(\)
    if not part:
        continue
    m = re.match\(r'^\([０-９\\d]+\)[．.]\\s*\(.+\)', part\)
    if not m:
        continue
    num_str = fw_to_hw\(m.group\(1\)\)
    try:
        num = int\(num_str\)
    except:
        continue
    
    if num in excluded:
        continue
    
    title = m.group\(2\).strip\(\)
    
    perry = ''
    perry_match = re.search\(r'Pe\(\\d+\)', part\)
    if perry_match:
        perry = perry_match.group\(1\)
    
    paragraphs = [p.strip\(\) for p in re.split\(r'\\n\\s*\\n', part\) if p.strip\(\)]
    
    moral = ''
    body_paras = []
    ref_found = False
    for i, p in enumerate\(paragraphs\):
        if re.search\(r'Pe\\d+', p\):
            ref_found = True
            if i > 1:
                candidate = paragraphs[i-1].replace\('\\n', ' '\).strip\(\)
                if len\(candidate\) < 200 and not re.search\(r'Pe\\d+', candidate\):
                    moral = candidate
                    body_paras = paragraphs[1:i-1]
                else:
                    body_paras = paragraphs[1:i]
            elif i == 1:
                body_paras = []
            break
    
    if not ref_found:
        body_paras = paragraphs[1:]
    
    body_text = ' '.join\(p.replace\('\\n', ' '\) for p in body_paras\)
    
    has_moral = bool\(moral\) and len\(moral\) > 3
    is_short = len\(body_text\) < 30
    
    status = '採用'
    if not has_moral and is_short:
        status = '除外'
    elif not has_moral:
        status = '除外候補'
    
    moral_short = moral[:100].replace\('\\n', ' '\) if moral else '\(なし\)'
    
    results.append\(\(num, title, perry, moral_short, status, body_text[:200].replace\('\\n',' '\)\)\)

results.sort\(key=lambda x: x[0]\)

print\(f'Total: {len\(results\)}'\)
print\(\)
adopted = sum\(1 for r in results if r[4] == '採用'\)
excluded_c = sum\(1 for r in results if r[4] == '除外候補'\)
removed = sum\(1 for r in results if r[4] == '除外'\)
print\(f'採用: {adopted}, 除外候補: {excluded_c}, 除外: {removed}'\)
print\(\)
for num, title, perry, moral, status, _ in results:
    print\(f'{num} | {title} | Pe{perry} | {moral} | {status}'\)
PYEOF)

with open\('D:/020_Work/05_environment/01_active/Info/Fables/references/dl/aesop1_clean.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    text = f.read\(\)

def fw_to_hw\(s\):
    result = ''
    for c in s:
        code = ord\(c\)
        if 0xFF10 <= code <= 0xFF19:

        else:
            result += c
    return result

    if not part:
        continue

    if not m:

    except:

        continue
    
    title = m.group\(2\).strip\(\)
    
    perry = ''

    if perry_match:
        perry = perry_match.group\(1\)
    
    paragraphs = [p.strip\(\) for p in re.split\(r'\\n\\s*\\n', part\) if p.strip\(\)]
    
    moral = ''
    body_paras = []

    for i, p in enumerate\(paragraphs\):
        if re.search\(r'Pe\\d+', p\):
            ref_found = True
            if i > 1:
                candidate = paragraphs[i-1].replace\('\\n', ' '\).strip\(\)
                if len\(candidate\) < 200 and not re.search\(r'Pe\\d+', candidate\):
                    moral = candidate
                    body_paras = paragraphs[1:i-1]
                else:
                    body_paras = paragraphs[1:i]

                body_paras = []

    if not ref_found:
        body_paras = paragraphs[1:]
    
    body_text = ' '.join\(p.replace\('\\n', ' '\) for p in body_paras\)
    
    has_moral = bool\(moral\) and len\(moral\) > 3
    is_short = len\(body_text\) < 30
    
    status = '採用'
    if not has_moral and is_short:
        status = '除外'
    elif not has_moral:
        status = '除外候補'
    
    moral_short = moral[:100].replace\('\\n', ' '\) if moral else '\(なし\)'
    
    results.append\(\(num, title, perry, moral_short, status\)\)

results.sort\(key=lambda x: x[0]\)

adopted = sum\(1 for r in results if r[4] == '採用'\)
excluded_c = sum\(1 for r in results if r[4] == '除外候補'\)
removed = sum\(1 for r in results if r[4] == '除外'\)
print\(f'Total: {len\(results\)} \(採用: {adopted}, 除外候補: {excluded_c}, 除外: {removed}\)'\)

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import re

with open\('D:/020_Work/05_environment/01_active/Info/Fables/references/dl/aesop1_utf8.txt', 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
    text = f.read\(\)

excluded = {3,4,6,8,10,11,13,15,16,18,20,21,25,27,31,32,33,34,38,39,44,46,49,51,52,54,55,57,58,60,61,62,70,73,74,77,80,81,84,85,86,95,109,110,117,118,122,127,128,130,134,135,139,151,152,162,163,174,179,186,187,190,191,193,202,205,208,216,232,239,240,244,249,250,251,254,257,258,260,280,283,288,291,293,297,300,302,311}

def fw_to_hw\(s\):
    result = ''
    for c in s:
        code = ord\(c\)
        if 0xFF10 <= code <= 0xFF19:
            result += chr\(code - 0xFF10 + ord\('0'\)\)
        else:
            result += c
    return result

# Split by story headers \(full-width number + full-width period at start of line\)
# Pattern: line with FullWidthDigits + ．
parts = re.split\(r'\\n\(?=[０-９\\d]+[．.]\)', text\)

results = []
for part in parts:
    part = part.strip\(\)
    if not part:
        continue
    m = re.match\(r'^\([０-９\\d]+\)[．.]\\s*\(.+\)', part\)
    if not m:
        continue
    num_str = fw_to_hw\(m.group\(1\)\)
    try:
        num = int\(num_str\)
    except:
        continue
    
    if num in excluded:
        continue
    
    title = m.group\(2\).strip\(\)
    
    # Extract Perry index
    perry = ''
    perry_match = re.search\(r'Pe\(\\d+\)', part\)
    if perry_match:
        perry = perry_match.group\(1\)
    
    # Split into paragraphs \(by blank lines\)
    paragraphs = [p.strip\(\) for p in re.split\(r'\\n\\s*\\n', part\) if p.strip\(\)]
    
    # Find moral: last paragraph before the reference line \(containing Pe\)
    moral = ''
    body_paras = []
    ref_found = False
    for i, p in enumerate\(paragraphs\):
        if re.search\(r'Pe\\d+', p\):
            ref_found = True
            if i > 1:
                candidate = paragraphs[i-1].replace\('\\n', ' '\).strip\(\)
                if len\(candidate\) < 200 and not re.search\(r'Pe\\d+', candidate\):
                    moral = candidate
                    body_paras = paragraphs[1:i-1]
                else:
                    body_paras = paragraphs[1:i]
            elif i == 1:
                body_paras = []
            break
    
    if not ref_found:
        body_paras = paragraphs[1:]
    
    body_text = ' '.join\(p.replace\('\\n', ' '\) for p in body_paras\)
    
    has_moral = bool\(moral\) and len\(moral\) > 3
    is_short = len\(body_text\) < 30
    
    status = '採用'
    if not has_moral and is_short:
        status = '除外'
    elif not has_moral:
        status = '除外候補'
    
    moral_short = moral[:100].replace\('\\n', ' '\) if moral else '\(なし\)'
    
    results.append\(\(num, title, perry, moral_short, status\)\)

results.sort\(key=lambda x: x[0]\)

# Write results to file
with open\('D:/020_Work/05_environment/01_active/Info/Fables/references/dl/aesop1_extracted.txt', 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as out:
    adopted = sum\(1 for r in results if r[4] == '採用'\)
    excluded_c = sum\(1 for r in results if r[4] == '除外候補'\)
    removed = sum\(1 for r in results if r[4] == '除外'\)
    out.write\(f'Total: {len\(results\)} \(採用: {adopted}, 除外候補: {excluded_c}, 除外: {removed}\)\\n\\n'\)
    out.write\(f'番号 | タイトル | Perry | 教訓 | 判定\\n'\)
    out.write\(f'--- | --- | --- | --- | ---\\n'\)
    for num, title, perry, moral, status in results:
        out.write\(f'{num} | {title} | Pe{perry} | {moral} | {status}\\n'\)

print\(f"Done: {len\(results\)} stories written"\)
PYEOF)

Bash(python3 -X utf8 -c "
import re, glob

files = glob.glob\('D:/020_Work/05_environment/01_active/Info/Fables/references/*.md'\)
for f in files:
    with open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
        content = fh.read\(\)
    before = content
    while True:
        content = re.sub\(r'\(\\|[ \\t]*\\n\)\\n\(\\|\)', r'\\1\\2', content\)
        if content == before:
            break
        before = content
    with open\(f, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as fh:
        fh.write\(content\)
    matches = re.findall\(r'\\|\\n\\n\\|', content\)
    print\(f'{f.split\(\\"/\\"\)[-1]}: {len\(matches\)} remaining'\)
")
